summary: NVDA hit new 52-week high at $216.83 on Apr 28, up 4% on the day. Shares up 20% in April and 92% YoY. Revenue up 65%, net income up 64.7%. Forward PE 24.97. Set to report Q1 FY2027 results May 20. Stock driven by AI infrastructure spend signals from Alphabet and Meta earnings.
